Cozy Earth: Our processing time takes 2-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, DHL, and OnTrac. Once shipped it will take 2-7 business days for domestic orders.

promotions.title: OPH10 (Unique)
content:
Promo Name - Birthday Trigger Consolation
Code: OPH10_	
Discount: $10 off $50 Purchase			

• Eligible for customers who text in, have already provided their birthday and had their birthday within the last 30 days.

• Eligible for customers who would otherwise have to wait a full year for the automated birthday trigger.

• If the customer has never purchased before, remind them to use their New Customer Welcome Code first before applying the Birthday Trigger.

Exclusions:
• Icons Collection
• Bowery Leather Bomber
• Suede Bomber Jacket
• Super 150s Premium Suit

conversation.message_text:
DreamCloud: Hello, this is Sam. Thanks for checking out DreamCloud. You can save up to 60% on mattresses, so you're shopping at a great time. dreamcloud.attn.tv/a40sRqq_6me8

Any questions I can answer for you?
.
Yes. I was wondering how much weight your bed frames can support?

DreamCloud: Our bed frames are designed to support the weight of the mattress plus sleepers. For specific weight limits, please refer to the product details on our website: https://dreamcloud.attn.tv/aUfjIONrgumU
If I order a frame how long will it take to get here?
Template used: "Shipping time"; last updated: 2024-02-08 12:24:42.215

DreamCloud: Different items and sizes have different ship times. After your order has been processed, delivery typically takes 2 - 5 business days once your mattress has shipped, and could be arriving via FedEx Ground delivery.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

content:
The 10% text sign-up code only works for these items: http://attn.tv/lg/offerdetails.html

PL5

Disclaimer:
Extra 10% off select vacuums, PuriCare air purifiers, TONE Free headphones and XBOOM Go wireless speakers is off the pre-tax sale price on LG.com only. Offer valid for one-time use only within 30 days of code being sent. To receive the additional 10% off savings, promotion code must be entered at online checkout and will be applied to eligible products only. If any of the qualifying items are removed from the cart, canceled or returned, the promotional savings will be void. Availability, prices and terms of offer are subject to change without notice. No adjustments to prior purchases and non-redeemable for cash.
Qualifying Vacuums: A905RM, A907GMS, A927KGMS, A927KVMS, A908VMR, A929KVM, R975GM1
Qualifying PuriCare Air Purifiers: AS560DWR0, AS330DWR0, AP151MBA1, AP151MWA1
Qualifying TONE Free headphones: HBS-FN6.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN6.ACUSWHI, HBS-FN5W.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN5W.ACUSWHI, HBS-FN4.ACUSBKI, HBS-FN4.ACUSWHI, TONE-FP8.AUSACLK, TONE-FP9.AUSACLK, TONE-FP5.AUSACLK
Qualifying LG Styler: S3MFBN, S3RFBN, S3WFBN, S5MSB, S3CW
Qualifying XBOOM Go Wireless Speakers: PL2, PL5, PL5W

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

conversation.message_text: LG Electronics USA: Reply Y to subscribe to LG recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders, product tips, special offers) from LG Electronics USA.
LG Electronics USA: Welcome to LG Electronics USA! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/WBe

LG Electronics USA: Thanks for joining our SMS program. We're so glad you're here!

Keep an eye out for exclusive offers and deals. For now, check out current promotions: lg.attn.tv/aO7PFTUBNDJP .
LG Electronics USA: Texts may be retained for customer support & other purposes. For more info, see Terms (lg.com/us/legal) and Privacy (lg.com/us/privacy)
LG Electronics USA: Hi, I'm Jordan - your go-to LG specialist. Feel free to text me any time, and save our contact so you don't miss any updates!
